title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns를 67억 달러에 인수하기로 했습니다. 이는 백혈병 치료제 시장에 대한 새로운 기회를 열어줍니다.

title: Russia Launches Springtime Offensive On Ukraine, As "That Other War" Drags On
summary:
Russia Launches Springtime Offensive On Ukraine, As "That Other War" Drags On

            Just days after we reported that trilateral peace negotiations between Russia, Ukraine, and the Trump administration had been suspended -  likely indefinitely - thanks to Washington's escalating involvement in the Iran war, Reuters is now confirming the inevitable: Moscow is pressing ahead with a fresh springtime offensive while Kiev scrambles to hold the line.

As we reported before, from the collapse of
summary_ko: 러시아가 우크라이나에 대한 봄攻勢를 시작했습니다. 이는 정치적, 군사적 문제로 인해 발생하는 것 같습니다.

title: STAT+: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T is nearing an early but pivotal study readout
summary: A preliminary readout from a study could vindicate Allogene Therapeutics' stubborn belief in its off-the-shelf CAR-T treatment.
summary_ko: Allogene Therapeutics의 오프-더-셸프 CAR-T 치료법에 대한 예비 연구 결과가 곧 발표될 예정이다.

title: STAT+: FDA approves Denali Therapeutics drug for Hunter syndrome
summary: The FDA approved a new medicine from Denali Therapeutics for Hunter syndrome, a notable decision by the agency after a string of rejections of rare disease drugs.
summary_ko: FDA가 Hunter 증후군 치료제를 승인했습니다. 이는 희귀병 치료제에 대한 승인이며, 의료 기술의 발전에 새로운 기회를 제공합니다.

title: Beam posts positive data on base editing treatment for AATD
summary: Updated data showed the biotech's approach to the rare lung and liver condition helped restore functional protective proteins in a small study.
summary_ko: Beam의 AATD 치료제가 초기 임상 시험에서 긍정적인 결과를 보여주었습니다.

title: Biopharma funding dropped 20% in 2025 as companies doubled down on big bets: IQVIA
summary: Biopharma funding fell 20% last year, reversing the post-pandemic recovery as the IPO haul dropped to the lowest level of the past 10 years, according to an IQVIA analysis.
summary_ko: 바이오파마 투자금은 2025년에 20% 감소했으며, 이는 IPO 수익이 10년 만에 최저치에 도달한 것으로 나타났습니다.

title: Gilead Sciences Gains an Opportunity for Immune System Reset With $1.7B Ouro Acquisition
summary:
Gilead Sciences is acquiring Ouro Medicines, a startup developing T cell engagers for a range of autoimmune diseases. Separately, Gilead is negotiating a deal with Galapagos to share in the development and potential commercialization of the Ouro drug. 
The post Gilead Sciences Gains an Opportunity for Immune System Reset With $1.7B Ouro Acquisition appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Gilead Sciences는 Ouro Medicines를 17억 달러에 인수하여 면역계 리셋 기술을 확보하고, Galapagos와의 개발 협력을 논의 중이다.

title: Heart failure is common. A quick MRI could improve diagnosis and guide treatment
summary: A new MRI method measures cardiac oxygen use in three minutes without catheters or radiation, offering a simpler way to study heart failure and metabolism.
summary_ko: MRI를 이용한 새로운 심장 질환 진단 방법이 개발되었습니다. 이 방법은 3분 만에 심장의 산소 사용량을 측정할 수 있으며, 심장 질환과 대사 장애의 연구에 새로운 가능성을 열어줍니다.

title: STAT+: Sarepta Therapeutics shares rise on early promise for rare disease drugs
summary: Sarepta Therapeutics’ next crop of medicines for muscular dystrophy appear to be safe and effective in early clinical trials, the company said.
summary_ko: Sarepta Therapeutics의 근이영양증 치료제가 초기 임상 시험에서 안전성과 효능을 보여주었습니다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta Therapeutics의 RNAi 치료제가 초기 임상 시험에서 근이영양증 치료에 대한 가능성을 보여주었습니다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자하고, 자가면역질환 치료를 위한 비스펙시픽 항체 개발에 집중하고 있습니다.

title: How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner
summary:
At Wayne General Hospital in rural Mississippi, clinicians are using Eko Health’s AI-powered digital stethoscope to detect heart conditions earlier in patients with limited access to specialists. 
The post How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 미시시피 주의 한 소규모 시골 병원이 Eko Health의 AI 기반 디지털 청진기(stethoscope)를 사용하여 전문가에 접근하기 어려운 환자에서 심장 질환을 조기에 발견하고 있다.
